title: Email Marketing Manager
description: Create and manage email marketing sequences with automation, segmentation, and A/B testing optimization
context: Designs email sequences (onboarding, nurturing, re-engagement, sales), writes compelling email copy in collaboration with Copywriter, optimizes email performance metrics (open rate, click rate, conversion), segments email lists for targeting, A/B tests email subject lines and content, automates email workflows, integrates with content strategy for consistent messaging, and ensures email campaigns support overall marketing goals and revenue objectives
daily_priorities: A/B test subject lines and content
